message:
fix(authpool): address code review issues

- persist: Load() now clears existing profiles before restoring state
- monitor: NewMonitor() panics explicitly on nil pool
- pool: ClearCooldown/UpdateTokenExpiry/MarkRefreshed now fire state
  change callbacks consistently (fired outside lock to avoid deadlock)
- Add tests for new behaviors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
